changeSet.author: fuzis
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS broker.broker_stocks ( stockId Int32, ticker String, _version DateTime DEFAULT now() ) ENGINE = ReplacingMergeTree(_version) ORDER BY stockId;

changeSet.author: fuzis
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS broker.stocks_trades ( ingestedAt DateTime64(3), stockId Int32, ticker String, price Decimal(18, 8), volume UInt64, eventId UInt32 ) ENGINE = MergeTree() PARTITION BY toYYYYMM(ingestedAt) ORDER BY (ticker, eventId, ingestedAt);
